title: Computer Terminal
description: A text editor with printing inside Minecraft
body:
# **Computer Terminal by DariusXX**
Inspired by [Scribble](https://modrinth.com/mod/scribble)

Computer Terminal is a simple and lightweight (hopefully) mod that allows you to type text into a computer that automatically saves. It also allows you to print the text on a document/paper which cannot be edited, good for documentation or roleplay!

## Features:
- Rich text editor (bold, italic, underline, color, very close to MS Word)
- Computer block with stylish editor, i tried ok?
- Print button
- Uneditable printed paper
- 50 lines of space inside the editor
- I think thats all
